pca.convergence: global optimum; numerical stability governed by the top-d eigengap
pca.complexity_note: one covariance build and one dense symmetric eigendecomposition

whitened_pca.objective_type: top-eigenspace of covariance with whitening on the selected modes
whitened_pca.convergence: same eigenproblem as PCA; whitening adds conditioning sensitivity on small selected eigenvalues
whitened_pca.complexity_note: same eigensolve as PCA plus diagonal rescaling on the selected modes

hard_whitened_invariance.solver: whitening eigendecomposition plus bottom-eigenspace of the normalized disagreement matrix
hard_whitened_invariance.convergence: global optimum of the spectral surrogate, but sensitive to sigma_bar conditioning and degenerate when delta approaches zero
hard_whitened_invariance.complexity_note: pair statistics plus one whitening eigendecomposition and one eigensolve of the normalized disagreement matrix

auto_fisher.convergence: global optimum once the denominator is regularized; numerical sensitivity set by the generalized eigengap and denominator conditioning
auto_fisher.complexity_note: pair statistics plus one dense generalized symmetric eigendecomposition

one_parameter_whitened_dnn_layer.solver: whitening eigendecomposition and full-space spectral filter
one_parameter_whitened_dnn_layer.objective_type: one-parameter whitened quadratic surrogate tr(G^T M G) + lambda ||G-I||_F^2
one_parameter_whitened_dnn_layer.convergence: unique global minimizer for any lambda > 0; no iterative optimization, only dense linear algebra
one_parameter_whitened_dnn_layer.complexity_note: same asymptotic order as PCA, but with two eigendecompositions and several dense matrix multiplications, so the cubic constant is much larger

notes: Timing separates moment construction from the analytic solve itself.
The one-parameter DNN layer is compared at a single layer; a depth-L network scales roughly linearly in L.
All methods are exact dense linear-algebra solvers; there is no iterative training loop in this benchmark.
The asymptotic order of the one-parameter layer now matches PCA and auto-Fisher up to constants; the remaining gap is a large dense-linear-algebra constant factor.
